source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter or Geist for durable enterprise UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese labels, tabular operational numbers, and compact dashboard hierarchy.
layout: Precise 8px grids, armored scale panels, scute-pattern dividers, durable tables, river-channel navigation rails, restrained badges, and dense operations dashboards.

prompts.label: Transparent Crocodile Scales motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Crocodile transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated crocodile scales motif for a design-system catalog: a compact three-quarter patch of crocodile armor scales and a partial crocodile head ridge, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: Realistic crocodile dorsal armor scales, rugged rectangular scutes, olive green armor, mud-brown grooves, dark water-neutral shadows, subtle wet river sheen, durable reptile texture, crisp silhouette edges, biologically plausible scale pattern.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, diagonal shield-like scale cluster suitable as a catalog motif; no cropping; clear outside contour for background removal.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves olive armor, mud brown recesses, water-gray neutrals, and tough enterprise-grade material texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no river background, no full landscape, no teeth, no blood, no aggression, no cartoon, no second animal, no text, no watermark, no props, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Crocodile" / "Crocodile Scales", derived from realistic crocodile armor scales. It is a robust enterprise system inspired by tropical river crocodile scutes, olive armor, mud-brown grooves, water-gray neutrals, and durable operational components.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution design-system source. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Crocodile", motif story, palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for enterprise river operations, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Palette direction: river mist background #f3f2e9, deep marsh ink #20251d, primary olive armor #5f6f38, secondary mud brown #766144, accent water teal #3d7773, highlight reed gold #b9a35e, danger clay #9a4f35, muted silt #9b9584, dark channel #2d3a34.
Typography: English guidance for Inter or Geist-style enterprise UI; Japanese guidance for Noto Sans JP, readable labels, tabular operational numbers, compact dashboard hierarchy.
UI style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product system, precise 8px grid, 8px radius, armored scale panels, subtle scute border pattern, durable table rows, calm olive primary buttons, mud-brown secondary controls, teal focus rings, restrained status badges, water-neutral chart surfaces.
Sample product context: enterprise river operations dashboard with assets, inspections, risk scores, compliance, water level, uptime, work orders, fleet status, alerts, and field notes.
Text: use short readable UI labels; include English and Japanese guidance clearly; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no cartoon crocodile, no aggressive teeth, no blood, no wildlife poster layout.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Crocodile" / "Crocodile Scales". It must feel like the same robust enterprise system translated to dark mode, derived from crocodile armor scales, tropical river mud, olive scutes, and water-neutral operational UI.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution design-system source. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Crocodile", "Dark Mode", palette swatches with hex labels, typography, Japanese typography with 日本語 UI examples, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts for enterprise river operations, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, token samples, and generated asset examples.
Preserve palette roles: deep marsh background #20251d, river mist text #f3f2e9, olive armor primary #839456, mud brown secondary #766144, water teal accent #4d8f89, reed gold highlight #c6b166, clay danger #b16446, silt muted #9b9584, dark channel panels #2d3a34.
Typography: English guidance for Inter or Geist-style enterprise UI; Japanese guidance for Noto Sans JP, readable labels, tabular operational numbers, compact dashboard hierarchy.
Visual details: dark marsh and channel backgrounds, pale river-mist text, olive primary actions, mud-brown secondary controls, teal focus rings, reed-gold status signals, clay alert badges, subtle crocodile scute texture in sidebars and cards, armored scale panel borders, durable table rows, precise shadcn/tweakcn controls, 8px grid, 8px radius.
Sample product context: enterprise river operations dashboard with assets, inspections, risk scores, compliance, water level, uptime, work orders, fleet status, alerts, and field notes.
Text: short readable UI labels; include English and Japanese guidance clearly; no paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible microtext, no generic purple gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no cartoon crocodile, no aggressive teeth, no blood, no wildlife poster layout.
